pattern_description: しらたま・しずく・ひよりだけが登場。Cocoは参加しない24枚。海の日から夏休みへ向かう時期に動物たちの言葉が日常を整える
week_theme: 梅雨明け目前——3匹だけの言葉が夏の始まりを整える〜七夕・海の日・夏休みへ向かう24枚
desc_ja: 梅雨が明ける瞬間、言葉の距離感もリセットされる。おはようからおやすみまで、感謝も本音も問いも。しらたま・しずく・ひよりだけが持つ温度で、七夕から夏休みへ向かう日常を整える24枚。
desc_en: From morning to night, gratitude and honest words — Shirotsuma, Shizuku, and Hiyori carry 24 stamps through midsummer. Their quiet warmth balances the distance in any relationship, just when summer starts to blur everything.

stamps.dialogue: おはよう
stamps.scene: 梅雨明けの朝、久しぶりの青空と一緒に届けたい一番やさしい一言
stamps.send_psychology: おはようございますより軽く、でも温かい朝の挨拶を届けたい
stamps.color_scheme: サニーコーラル・モーニングゴールド・フレッシュホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Sunny coral and morning gold palette with fresh white, evoking the first light of a clear midsummer morning. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), full body front view, sitting upright with both front paws pressed together as if greeting, tail curled neatly, face glowing with warm morning energy — the expression of someone genuinely happy to see you at the start of the day; tiny sun-ray watercolor strokes radiate from behind. Composition: centered with large copy space above.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『おはよう』in warm coral lettering at top center; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.
stamps.content: おはよう

stamps.dialogue: いつもありがとう
stamps.scene: 日常の感謝を、重くなりすぎないカジュアルな温度で届ける
stamps.send_psychology: いつもありがとうございますより近い距離感で、でも心から感謝を伝えたい
stamps.color_scheme: シーフォームグリーン・パールホワイト・サマーゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Seafoam green and pearl white with summer gold, evoking a warm breezy midsummer afternoon. Sparkling warm eyes radiating genuine everyday gratitude.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) sits facing the viewer, one paw raised with a small warm wave of thanks; Hiyori (gentle white bird) perches on Shirotsuma's raised paw, wings slightly open, head tilted with a bright grateful expression — two friends together conveying the same heartfelt thanks; seafoam watercolor wash behind. Composition: bust-up front view, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『いつもありがとう』in warm golden flowing lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.
stamps.content: いつもありがとう

stamps.dialogue: おやすみ〜
stamps.scene: 夏の夜、少しカジュアルにおやすみを伝えたい場面
stamps.send_psychology: 親しい相手へ、力が抜けた夜の挨拶を届けたい
stamps.color_scheme: ムーンライトブルー・スターダストシルバー・ナイトホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Moonlight blue and stardust silver with night white, evoking the quiet end of a perfect summer night. Sparkling warm eyes softly drooping with pleasant tiredness and warmth.
[Character] Hiyori (gentle white bird), full body side view tilted slightly, one wing half-raised as if in a small lazy wave goodbye, head drooped at a drowsy peaceful angle with eyes soft and heavy but still warmly shining — not sad, just the pleasant tired of a good day ending; tiny watercolor stars and a crescent moon drift in the background. Composition: centered with large copy space at top right.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『おやすみ〜』in soft moon-silver lettering with the 〜 drawn with a gentle trailing stroke, at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.
stamps.content: おやすみ〜

stamps.dialogue: ん〜好きよりの大好き
stamps.scene: 「大好き」より一段上の気持ちを、少し恥ずかしそうに届ける
stamps.send_psychology: 好きより大好きが近いけど素直に言えない、絶妙な距離感を届けたい
stamps.color_scheme: ウォーターメロンピンク・ソフトコーラル・バブリーホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Watermelon pink and soft coral with bubbly white, evoking that sweet embarrassed warmth of admitting more feeling than intended. Sparkling warm eyes with a shy-but-delighted expression caught in the act of feeling too much.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), full body view, sitting with both front paws covering the face in a classic embarrassed-hiding pose, but with eyes just peeking through the paws — sparkling with warmth and the amusement of being caught loving someone more than expected; a tiny soft blush tint on the ear tips; watermelon-pink watercolor petals drift around. Composition: front-facing, copy space at bottom.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『ん〜好きよりの大好き』in soft rounded lettering with the 〜 stretched in that tell-tale deliberating way, at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.
stamps.content: ん〜好きよりの大好き

stamps.send_psychology: 梅雨の蒸し暑さに疲れた相手へ、丁寧に、でも温かく今日一日の幸せを願いたい

Aurora gold and sunrise coral with clear morning blue, evoking the luminous quality of a summer morning blessing. Sparkling warm eyes radiating genuine warmth and a sense of ritual morning prayer.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle), shell decorated with a soft sunrise watercolor pattern in amber and gold, sitting in a composed upright posture with both front flippers gently pressed together at chest level, eyes softly closed with an expression of quiet sincere blessing — the energy of someone who means it, every single morning; sunrise watercolor light radiates from behind. Composition: centered slightly low, large copy space above.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『本日も笑顔溢れるいちにちになりますように』in flowing gentle calligraphy, two-line layout, at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.send_psychology: 深い感謝と縁への感動を3匹の力を借りて届けたい

[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), Shizuku (small wise turtle), and Hiyori (gentle white bird) gathered in a close warm triangle — cat at center sitting tall, turtle at left looking up softly, bird landing on the right with wings just folding; all three with expressions of quiet moved warmth, the specific glow of creatures who understand the rarity of a good encounter; stardust watercolor confetti and summer cosmos blossoms around them. stamps.send_psychology: 「嫌いじゃない」で届ける絶妙なCoco流の愛情距離感

[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle), shell decorated with an understated amber-ring watercolor pattern, seated facing the viewer with one flipper raised in a small matter-of-fact gesture, eyes half-closed in the expression of a creature who has considered all the options and settled on 'not disliking it' as the most accurate assessment — a tiny twitch of amusement at the corner of the mouth. Composition: three-quarter view, large copy space at top left.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『そういうところ嫌いじゃない』in casual-yet-deliberate lettering at upper right; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.dialogue: 一生そのままなの？
stamps.scene: 変わろうとしない相手に、愛のある問いを静かに投げかける
stamps.send_psychology: 叱責ではなく、問いとして相手の変化を促したい
stamps.color_scheme: フォググレー・アンバーウォーム・ペーパーアイボリー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Fog grey and warm amber with paper ivory, evoking the quiet weight of a wise creature asking the question you knew was coming. Sparkling warm eyes with a steady, patient, and entirely unsurprised expression.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle), shell decorated with concentric fog-grey watercolor rings, seated and facing the viewer with absolute stillness — not moving, not reacting, just looking, with the most calm and deliberate expression of 'I am asking a question and I will wait as long as it takes'; a tiny leaf rests on the shell. Composition: head-on close-up, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『一生そのままなの？』in calm, quietly pointed lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.
stamps.content: 一生そのままなの？

stamps.dialogue: それがいいの？
stamps.scene: 相手の選択を確認し、でも判断はしない穏やかな問い

stamps.dialogue: それでいいの？
stamps.scene: 二人がかりで穏やかに確認する、少し重みのある問い
stamps.send_psychology: やさしく、でも二人で同じ問いを投げることで、相手に考えさせたい

stamps.scene: 相手の行動パターンへの、温かいけど鋭い指摘
stamps.send_psychology: 愛があるからこそ、変わらないことへの危機感を伝えたい

[Character] Hiyori (gentle white bird), shown from below looking up, caught in the very first moment of takeoff — wings just spreading, claws leaving the branch, face tilted upward with a luminous easy-confidence expression; the look of a creature for whom 'just try it' is not advice but a way of life; sunshine watercolor bursting from behind. stamps.dialogue: 何事も小さなことの積み重ねだよ

stamps.send_psychology: 焦っている相手に、小さな一歩の重さを穏やかに届けたい

stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Forest emerald and stone beige with earthy gold, evoking the geological patience of a creature that understands slow accumulation. Sparkling warm eyes with deep, settled, absolutely unrushed wisdom.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle), shell decorated with tiny stacked-pebble watercolor pattern suggesting accumulation, sitting beside a small watercolor stack of smooth stones (like a cairn), one flipper resting lightly on the stones as if presenting them as evidence; expression serene and completely at peace with the pace of progress; forest light filtering through soft green watercolor. Composition: side-view with stones, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『何事も小さなことの積み重ねだよ』in grounded patient lettering, two-line layout, at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.
stamps.content: 何事も小さなことの積み重ねだよ

stamps.dialogue: 大きな一歩より小さな一歩

stamps.dialogue: 大切にしてるよ
